title: Opinion
text: Our work can not be separated from our values, perspectives, and experiences.

title: Research
text:
My work intersects psychiatry, genomics, and sociology to better understand mental health.
I lead three programs of research:

title: Research
text:
Social isolation and mental health
To understand the link between experiences of social isolation and mental health from childhood to young adulthood.

title: Research
text:
Depression symptoms
To quantify how experiences across the life span contribute to depression symptoms using innovative statistical approaches to integrate large-scale longitudinal data.

title: Research
text:
Genetics and society
To demonstrate how genetic findings and teachings must be embedded within societal context.

  Humane Genetics Curriculum

title: Katherine N Thompson, PhD
text:
Hello!
I am postdoctoral researcher in psychiatric epidemiology who conducts quantitative research on depression, social isolation, and health equity. I am based in the Department of Sociology at Purdue University with a PhD in Social, Genetic, and Developmental Psychology from King’s College London.
I committed to open, diverse, and communicable science.
